description: Render a publication-quality scientific schematic from a natural-language description using Nano Banana 2 with smart iterative refinement and a Gemini quality review, via OpenRouter. Writes the generated image to record_store.
rules: read-only — produces a local image file; never mutates a remote service
prompt text is transmitted to openrouter.ai (OPENROUTER_API_KEY)
DOC_TYPE sets the quality threshold (journal 8.5 .. presentation 6.5; default 7.5)
iterations capped at 2 by the vendored wrapper
no API key / no network -> porter writes a placeholder output file so the contract holds
usage: Set PROMPT (required). Optional DOC_TYPE (journal|conference|poster|presentation|report|grant|thesis|preprint|default), OUTPUT_NAME (default schematic.png). Output: ${RECORD_STORE}/${OUTPUT_NAME}.
limitation: Requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY, the 'requests' package, and network access to generate a real image. Generation + quality review can take tens of seconds per iteration. Without these, only a placeholder file is written.
